---
pagetitle: "Teaching - Thinh Ong"
description: "Short courses, workshops and talks on infectious disease modelling, statistics, R, and the craft of research."
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ===================== Teaching page (bento panels + contents nav + modal) ===================== */
.tq{ --e:cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); --tq-panel:#f3f5fb; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 clamp(18px,4vw,46px) 46px; }
html[data-theme="dark"] .tq{ --tq-panel:rgba(255,255,255,.045); }

/* compact two-column hero */
.tq-hero{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr; align-items:end; gap:clamp(20px,4vw,56px); padding:clamp(8px,1.8vw,16px) 0 clamp(18px,2.4vw,26px); }
.tq-eyebrow{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; font-size:.74rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.18em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--brand-soft); }
.tq-eyebrow::before{ content:""; width:22px; height:2px; border-radius:2px; background:var(--brand-soft); }
.tq-h1{ margin:.1em 0 0; font-family:"Bebas Neue",sans-serif; font-weight:400; line-height:.9; letter-spacing:.5px; text-transform:uppercase; font-size:clamp(2.3rem,5vw,4rem); color:var(--heading); border-bottom:0 !important; padding-bottom:0 !important; }
.tq-h1 .tq-thin{ color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--heading) 42%, var(--bg)); }
.tq-lead{ margin:0 0 .35em; color:var(--text-muted); font-size:clamp(.88rem,1vw,.98rem); line-height:1.55; }

/* body: content + sticky contents nav */
.tq-body{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 196px; gap:clamp(26px,3.4vw,48px); align-items:start; }
.tq-main{ min-width:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:clamp(16px,2vw,24px); }

/* soft panels separate sections instead of lines */
.tq-block{ background:var(--tq-panel); border-radius:18px; padding:clamp(18px,2.3vw,30px); scroll-margin-top:96px; }
/* neutralise the theme's :target::before offset hack (it breaks the subgrid columns); scroll-margin-top handles the offset */
.tq-block:target::before, .tq-col:target::before{ content:none !important; display:none !important; }

/* contents nav */
.tq-toc{ position:sticky; top:92px; align-self:start; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; }
.tq-toc-h{ font-size:.64rem; letter-spacing:.16em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text-faint); margin:0 0 6px 14px; }
.tq-toc a{ display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:10px; padding:8px 13px; color:var(--text-muted); text-decoration:none; line-height:1.2;
  border-left:2px solid transparent; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; transition:background .2s var(--e), color .2s var(--e), border-color .2s var(--e); }
.tq-toc a:hover{ color:var(--heading); background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 7%, transparent); }
.tq-toc a.active{ color:var(--brand); border-left-color:var(--brand); background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 9%, transparent); }
.tq-toc .tn{ font-size:.66rem; color:var(--brand-soft); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; }
.tq-toc .tt{ font-size:.9rem; font-weight:500; }

/* section heads */
.tq-sechead{ display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between; gap:14px; margin-bottom:clamp(12px,1.6vw,16px); }
.tq-num{ display:block; font-size:.7rem; letter-spacing:.2em; color:var(--brand-soft); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; margin-bottom:7px; }
.tq-sectitle{ margin:0; font-family:"Bebas Neue",sans-serif; font-weight:400; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.5px; line-height:1.02; font-size:clamp(1.4rem,2.2vw,1.9rem); color:var(--heading); border-bottom:0 !important; padding-bottom:0 !important; }
.tq-secsub{ margin:8px 0 0; font-size:.83rem; color:var(--text-muted); line-height:1.5; max-width:52ch; }
.tq-count{ flex:none; font-size:.74rem; color:var(--text-faint); white-space:nowrap; }

/* cards */
.tq-row{ display:grid; gap:clamp(14px,1.6vw,22px); }
.tq-row.multi{ grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); }
.tq-card{ display:block; text-decoration:none; color:inherit; cursor:pointer; }
.tq-img{ position:relative; aspect-ratio:3/2; border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden; display:grid; place-items:center;
  --deep:color-mix(in srgb, var(--hue) 55%, #0b1228);
  --mid:var(--hue);
  --lite:color-mix(in srgb, var(--hue) 58%, #ffffff);
  --soft:color-mix(in srgb, var(--hue) 80%, #ffffff);
  background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--hue) 26%, #ffffff);
  transition:transform .4s var(--e), box-shadow .4s var(--e); will-change:transform; }
html[data-theme="dark"] .tq-img{ background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--hue) 26%, var(--bg-2)); }
.tq-art{ width:64%; height:64%; display:block; transition:transform .5s var(--e); }
.tq-meta{ margin-top:11px; }
.tq-meta-top{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:baseline; gap:8px; }
.tq-format{ font-size:.66rem; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text-faint); }
.tq-date{ font-size:.76rem; color:var(--text-muted); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; }
.tq-cardname{ margin:6px 0 0; font-size:.95rem; font-weight:500; line-height:1.32; color:var(--heading); transition:color .25s var(--e); }
.tq-tags{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; margin-top:10px; }
.tq-tag{ font-size:.66rem; color:var(--text-muted); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:999px; padding:3px 9px; white-space:nowrap; }

/* duo of single-course topics, aligned with subgrid */
.tq-duo{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); column-gap:clamp(16px,2vw,26px); row-gap:14px; }
.tq-col{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px; min-width:0; scroll-margin-top:96px; }
@supports (grid-template-rows:subgrid){
  .tq-duo{ grid-template-rows:auto auto; }
  .tq-duo .tq-col{ display:grid; grid-row:span 2; grid-template-rows:subgrid; }
}

/* hover + tap */
@media (hover:hover){
  .tq-card:hover .tq-img{ transform:translateY(-5px); box-shadow:var(--card-shadow); }
  .tq-card:hover .tq-art{ transform:scale(1.05); }
  .tq-card:hover .tq-cardname{ color:var(--brand); }
}
.tq-card:active .tq-img{ transform:translateY(-2px) scale(.99); }

/* entrance (opacity only, so transforms never fight the subgrid) */
.tq.anim .tq-block{ opacity:0; transition:opacity .6s var(--e); }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in{ opacity:1; }
.tq.anim .tq-block .tq-card{ opacity:0; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card{ opacity:1; transition:opacity .5s var(--e); }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-row.multi .tq-card:nth-child(1){ transition-delay:.06s; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-row.multi .tq-card:nth-child(2){ transition-delay:.14s; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-row.multi .tq-card:nth-child(3){ transition-delay:.22s; }
.tq.anim .tq-duo.in .tq-col:nth-child(1) .tq-card{ transition-delay:.06s; }
.tq.anim .tq-duo.in .tq-col:nth-child(2) .tq-card{ transition-delay:.14s; }

/* ===== Draw: each card symbol draws / assembles itself as its block reveals =====
   Same "Draw" language as the Research page. Strokes carry pathLength="100" so a
   short code line and a long curve draw at the same speed. Only opacity, transform
   and stroke-dashoffset move. Every hidden start state is gated behind .tq.anim, so
   if the script never runs the art is fully visible. --d staggers per card,
   --dl adds an optional per-element offset. */
@keyframes tqDraw{ to{ stroke-dashoffset:0; } }
@keyframes tqFade{ to{ opacity:1; } }
@keyframes tqPop{ to{ opacity:1; transform:scale(1); } }
@keyframes tqFill{ to{ transform:scaleY(1); } }

/* hidden start states (only while animating) */
.tq.anim .d-line, .tq.anim .d-grid{ stroke-dasharray:101; stroke-dashoffset:101; }
.tq.anim .d-area{ opacity:0; }
.tq.anim .d-orb{ opacity:0; transform-box:fill-box; transform-origin:center; transform:scale(.5); }
.tq.anim .d-bar1, .tq.anim .d-bar2, .tq.anim .d-bar3{ transform-box:fill-box; transform-origin:50% 100%; transform:scaleY(0); }

/* run them once the card's block is on screen */
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-line{ animation:tqDraw 1s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + var(--dl,0s)) forwards; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-grid{ animation:tqDraw .9s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .2s + var(--dl,0s)) forwards; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-area{ animation:tqFade .9s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .25s + var(--dl,0s)) forwards; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-orb{ animation:tqPop .55s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .1s + var(--dl,0s)) forwards; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-bar1{ animation:tqFill .75s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .12s) forwards; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-bar2{ animation:tqFill .75s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .24s) forwards; }
.tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-bar3{ animation:tqFill .75s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .36s) forwards; }

/* ===== modal ===== */
.tqm{ position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:3000; display:none; }
.tqm.open{ display:block; }
.tqm-scrim{ position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(10,16,36,.5); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px); backdrop-filter:blur(8px); opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s var(--e); }
.tqm.open .tqm-scrim{ opacity:1; }
.tqm-dialog{ position:absolute; left:50%; top:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-46%); width:min(660px,94vw); max-height:88vh; display:flex; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden;
  background:var(--surface,#fff); border-radius:18px; box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(16,27,53,.32); opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s var(--e), transform .38s var(--e); }
html[data-theme="dark"] .tqm-dialog{ background:#0e1530; }
.tqm.open .tqm-dialog{ opacity:1; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); }
.tqm-accent{ height:5px; flex:none; }
.tqm-x{ position:absolute; top:13px; right:13px; z-index:3; width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:50%; cursor:pointer; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--bg); color:var(--heading); font-size:.95rem; display:grid; place-items:center; transition:transform .25s var(--e), color .2s var(--e); }
.tqm-x:hover{ transform:rotate(90deg); color:var(--brand); }
.tqm-body{ overflow-y:auto; padding:clamp(20px,3vw,30px); }
.tqm-eyebrow{ font-size:.7rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--brand-soft); }
.tqm-title{ margin:6px 0 0; font-family:"Bebas Neue",sans-serif; font-weight:400; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.5px; line-height:1; font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3.4vw,2.4rem); color:var(--heading); border-bottom:0 !important; padding-bottom:0 !important; }
.tqm-gal{ display:flex; gap:10px; overflow-x:auto; margin:16px 0 4px; scroll-snap-type:x mandatory; scrollbar-width:thin; }
.tqm-gal figure{ margin:0; flex:0 0 auto; width:min(76%,300px); scroll-snap-align:center; }
.tqm-gal img{ width:100%; aspect-ratio:3/2; object-fit:cover; border-radius:12px; display:block; }
.tqm-gal figcaption{ font-size:.74rem; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:6px; }
.tqm-meta{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px 18px; padding:15px 0; border-top:1px solid var(--border); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); margin:16px 0; }
.tqm-meta .k{ font-size:.63rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.1em; color:var(--text-faint); }
.tqm-meta .v{ font-size:.9rem; color:var(--heading); font-weight:500; margin-top:3px; }
.tqm-long{ color:var(--text); line-height:1.62; font-size:.95rem; margin:0; }
.tqm-tags{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:7px; margin-top:14px; }
.tqm-tag{ font-size:.7rem; color:var(--text-muted); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:999px; padding:4px 11px; }
.tqm-btns{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-top:18px; }
.tqm-btn{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; font-weight:600; font-size:.9rem; padding:11px 18px; border-radius:11px; text-decoration:none; background:var(--brand); color:#fff; transition:background .2s var(--e), transform .2s var(--e); }
.tqm-btn:hover{ background:var(--brand-strong); color:#fff; transform:translateY(-1px); }

/* responsive */
@media (max-width:860px){ .tq-body{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } .tq-toc{ display:none; } }
@media (max-width:680px){
  .tq-hero{ grid-template-columns:1fr; align-items:start; gap:12px; }
  .tq-row.multi{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
  .tq-duo{ grid-template-columns:1fr; row-gap:0; }
  .tq-duo .tq-col + .tq-col{ margin-top:18px; }
  .tq-duo .tq-card{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:96px 1fr; gap:14px; align-items:center; }
  .tq-duo .tq-img{ aspect-ratio:1/1; }
  .tq-duo .tq-meta{ margin-top:0; }
  .tq-duo .tq-art{ width:62%; height:62%; }
  .tqm-dialog{ top:auto; bottom:0; transform:translate(-50%,100%); width:100vw; max-height:92vh; border-radius:18px 18px 0 0; }
  .tqm.open .tqm-dialog{ transform:translate(-50%,0); }
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  .tq.anim .tq-block, .tq.anim .tq-block .tq-card{ opacity:1 !important; }
  .tq-img, .tq-art, .tqm-dialog, .tqm-scrim{ transition:none !important; }
  .tq.anim .d-line, .tq.anim .d-grid{ stroke-dashoffset:0 !important; }
  .tq.anim .d-area, .tq.anim .d-orb{ opacity:1 !important; transform:none !important; }
  .tq.anim .d-bar1, .tq.anim .d-bar2, .tq.anim .d-bar3{ transform:scaleY(1) !important; }
  .tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-line, .tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-grid,
  .tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-area, .tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-orb,
  .tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-bar1, .tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-bar2,
  .tq.anim .tq-block.in .tq-card .d-bar3{ animation:none !important; }
}
</style>

<svg width="0" height="0" style="position:absolute" aria-hidden="true">
  <filter id="tq-grain"><feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.9" numOctaves="2" stitchTiles="stitch"/><feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0"/><feComponentTransfer><feFuncA type="linear" slope="0.55"/></feComponentTransfer></filter>
</svg>

<section class="tq">
  <div class="tq-hero">
    <div>
      <span class="tq-eyebrow">Courses &amp; talks</span>
      <h1 class="tq-h1">Teaching <span class="tq-thin">&amp; Training</span></h1>
    </div>
    <p class="tq-lead">Short courses, workshops and talks on infectious disease modelling, statistics, R, and the craft of research.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="tq-body">
    <main class="tq-main">
      <!-- 01 -->
      <section class="tq-block" id="sec-modelling">
        <div class="tq-sechead">
          <div>
            <span class="tq-num">[01]</span>
            <h2 class="tq-sectitle">Disease Modelling</h2>
            <p class="tq-secsub">Compartmental models, statistics, and the maths of outbreaks.</p>
          </div>
          <span class="tq-count">3 courses</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tq-row multi">
          <a class="tq-card" data-id="idm-intro" href="modelling/idm-intro/">
            <div class="tq-img" style="--hue:#7d92d6; --d:0s">
              <svg class="tq-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="tqc-sir"><circle cx="38" cy="44" r="15"/><circle cx="82" cy="44" r="15"/><circle cx="60" cy="88" r="15"/></clipPath></defs>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="53" y1="44" x2="67" y2="44" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.55;--dl:.45s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="76" y1="56" x2="66" y2="76" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.55;--dl:.55s"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="38" cy="44" r="15" style="fill:var(--lite)"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="82" cy="44" r="15" style="fill:var(--mid);--dl:.12s"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="60" cy="88" r="15" style="fill:var(--deep);--dl:.24s"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#tqc-sir)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.55"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#tq-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="tq-meta">
              <div class="tq-meta-top"><span class="tq-format">Short course</span><span class="tq-date">Mar 2023</span></div>
              <p class="tq-cardname">Introduction to Infectious Disease Modelling</p>
              <div class="tq-tags"><span class="tq-tag">SIR</span><span class="tq-tag">Compartmental</span><span class="tq-tag">R</span></div>
            </div>
          </a>
          <a class="tq-card" data-id="idm4b" href="modelling/idm4b/">
            <div class="tq-img" style="--hue:#5fa6c6; --d:.09s">
              <svg class="tq-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="tqc-curve"><path d="M16 96 C 44 96 46 44 60 44 C 74 44 76 96 104 96 Z"/></clipPath></defs>
                <line x1="14" y1="96" x2="106" y2="96" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.35"/>
                <path class="d-area" d="M16 96 C 44 96 46 44 60 44 C 74 44 76 96 104 96 Z" style="fill:var(--mid)"/>
                <path class="d-line" pathLength="100" d="M16 96 C 44 96 46 44 60 44 C 74 44 76 96 104 96" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="60" cy="44" r="4.5" style="fill:var(--deep);--dl:.8s"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#tqc-curve)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.55"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#tq-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="tq-meta">
              <div class="tq-meta-top"><span class="tq-format">Lecture series</span><span class="tq-date">May 2024</span></div>
              <p class="tq-cardname">Infectious Disease Modelling for Babies</p>
              <div class="tq-tags"><span class="tq-tag">SIR</span><span class="tq-tag">Beginners</span><span class="tq-tag">Intuition</span></div>
            </div>
          </a>
          <a class="tq-card" data-id="s4bvn" href="https://drthinhong.com/s4bvn/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <div class="tq-img" style="--hue:#9485cf; --d:.18s">
              <svg class="tq-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="tqc-stats"><path d="M20 96 C 40 96 48 52 60 52 C 72 52 80 96 100 96 Z"/></clipPath></defs>
                <line x1="14" y1="96" x2="106" y2="96" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.35"/>
                <path class="d-area" d="M20 96 C 40 96 48 52 60 52 C 72 52 80 96 100 96 Z" style="fill:var(--mid)"/>
                <path class="d-line" pathLength="100" d="M20 96 C 40 96 48 52 60 52 C 72 52 80 96 100 96" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round"/>
                <line class="d-grid" pathLength="100" x1="60" y1="54" x2="60" y2="96" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;--dl:.7s"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#tqc-stats)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.55"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#tq-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="tq-meta">
              <div class="tq-meta-top"><span class="tq-format">Lecture series</span><span class="tq-date">Dec 2025</span></div>
              <p class="tq-cardname">Statistics for Babies</p>
              <div class="tq-tags"><span class="tq-tag">Probability</span><span class="tq-tag">Bayesian</span><span class="tq-tag">MCMC</span></div>
            </div>
          </a>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- 02 -->
      <section class="tq-block" id="sec-r">
        <div class="tq-sechead">
          <div>
            <span class="tq-num">[02]</span>
            <h2 class="tq-sectitle">R Programming</h2>
            <p class="tq-secsub">R for data science, from your first script onward.</p>
          </div>
          <span class="tq-count">3 courses</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tq-row multi">
          <a class="tq-card" data-id="r4babies" href="others/r4babies/">
            <div class="tq-img" style="--hue:#c8a86a; --d:0s">
              <svg class="tq-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="tqc-data"><rect x="32" y="70" width="14" height="26" rx="3"/><rect x="53" y="56" width="14" height="40" rx="3"/><rect x="74" y="42" width="14" height="54" rx="3"/></clipPath></defs>
                <line x1="24" y1="96" x2="96" y2="96" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.35"/>
                <rect class="d-bar1" x="32" y="70" width="14" height="26" rx="3" style="fill:var(--lite)"/>
                <rect class="d-bar2" x="53" y="56" width="14" height="40" rx="3" style="fill:var(--mid)"/>
                <rect class="d-bar3" x="74" y="42" width="14" height="54" rx="3" style="fill:var(--deep)"/>
                <polyline class="d-line" pathLength="100" points="39,66 60,52 81,38" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;opacity:.7;--dl:.5s"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="81" cy="38" r="4" style="fill:var(--deep);--dl:.7s"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#tqc-data)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.55"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#tq-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="tq-meta">
              <div class="tq-meta-top"><span class="tq-format">Short course</span><span class="tq-date">Aug 2023</span></div>
              <p class="tq-cardname">R for Babies</p>
              <div class="tq-tags"><span class="tq-tag">R</span><span class="tq-tag">Data science</span><span class="tq-tag">Beginners</span></div>
            </div>
          </a>
          <a class="tq-card" data-id="r-training" href="https://oucru-modelling.github.io/R-training-2025/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <div class="tq-img" style="--hue:#8aa86a; --d:.09s">
              <svg class="tq-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="tqc-code"><rect x="26" y="32" width="68" height="56" rx="8"/></clipPath></defs>
                <rect class="d-area" x="26" y="32" width="68" height="56" rx="8" style="fill:var(--lite)"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="35" cy="40" r="2.4" style="fill:var(--deep);opacity:.55;--dl:.25s"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="43" cy="40" r="2.4" style="fill:var(--deep);opacity:.55;--dl:.32s"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="51" cy="40" r="2.4" style="fill:var(--deep);opacity:.55;--dl:.39s"/>
                <line class="d-grid" pathLength="100" x1="26" y1="47" x2="94" y2="47" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:1.6;opacity:.3;--dl:.2s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="35" y1="60" x2="57" y2="60" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--mid);stroke-width:3.2;stroke-linecap:round;--dl:.45s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="61" y1="60" x2="79" y2="60" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3.2;stroke-linecap:round;--dl:.57s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="42" y1="69" x2="74" y2="69" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3.2;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.7;--dl:.69s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="42" y1="78" x2="60" y2="78" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3.2;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.7;--dl:.81s"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#tqc-code)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.5"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#tq-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="tq-meta">
              <div class="tq-meta-top"><span class="tq-format">Short course</span><span class="tq-date">2025</span></div>
              <p class="tq-cardname">OUCRU R Training</p>
              <div class="tq-tags"><span class="tq-tag">R</span><span class="tq-tag">Data viz</span><span class="tq-tag">Quarto</span></div>
            </div>
          </a>
          <a class="tq-card" data-id="r-cafe" href="https://oucru-modelling.github.io/R-cafe-materials/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <div class="tq-img" style="--hue:#a8845e; --d:.18s">
              <svg class="tq-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="tqc-cafe"><path d="M40 50 H80 L75 84 Q73 89 60 89 Q47 89 45 84 Z"/></clipPath></defs>
                <ellipse class="d-area" cx="60" cy="93" rx="27" ry="4" style="fill:var(--lite)"/>
                <path class="d-area" d="M40 50 H80 L75 84 Q73 89 60 89 Q47 89 45 84 Z" style="fill:var(--mid)"/>
                <path class="d-line" pathLength="100" d="M80 56 Q93 57 93 67 Q93 77 80 77" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:round;--dl:.35s"/>
                <ellipse class="d-orb" cx="60" cy="50" rx="20" ry="4.5" style="fill:var(--deep);opacity:.7;--dl:.3s"/>
                <path class="d-line" pathLength="100" d="M53 30 q-5 6 0 12" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.6;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.4;--dl:.6s"/>
                <path class="d-line" pathLength="100" d="M61 27 q-5 6 0 12" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.6;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.4;--dl:.72s"/>
                <path class="d-line" pathLength="100" d="M69 30 q-5 6 0 12" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:2.6;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.4;--dl:.84s"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#tqc-cafe)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.5"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#tq-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="tq-meta">
              <div class="tq-meta-top"><span class="tq-format">Short course</span><span class="tq-date">2025</span></div>
              <p class="tq-cardname">R Caf&eacute;</p>
              <div class="tq-tags"><span class="tq-tag">R</span><span class="tq-tag">tidyverse</span><span class="tq-tag">Quarto</span></div>
            </div>
          </a>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- single-course topics, side by side -->
      <div class="tq-block tq-duo">
        <section class="tq-col" id="sec-skills">
          <div class="tq-sechead">
            <div>
              <span class="tq-num">[03]</span>
              <h2 class="tq-sectitle">Transferable Skills</h2>
              <p class="tq-secsub">Writing, reviewing and the craft around research.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <a class="tq-card" data-id="aw4b" href="others/aw4b/">
            <div class="tq-img" style="--hue:#c187a8; --d:0s">
              <svg class="tq-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="tqc-doc"><rect x="34" y="26" width="52" height="68" rx="7"/><circle cx="82" cy="82" r="13"/></clipPath></defs>
                <rect class="d-area" x="34" y="26" width="52" height="68" rx="7" style="fill:var(--lite)"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="44" y1="44" x2="76" y2="44" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.5;--dl:.3s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="44" y1="56" x2="76" y2="56" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.5;--dl:.42s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="44" y1="68" x2="64" y2="68" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.5;--dl:.54s"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="82" cy="82" r="13" style="fill:var(--deep);--dl:.5s"/>
                <path class="d-line" pathLength="100" d="M76 82 l4 4 l9 -11" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--lite);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;--dl:.8s"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#tqc-doc)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.5"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#tq-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="tq-meta">
              <div class="tq-meta-top"><span class="tq-format">Workshop</span><span class="tq-date">2024</span></div>
              <p class="tq-cardname">Academic Writing</p>
              <div class="tq-tags"><span class="tq-tag">Peer review</span><span class="tq-tag">Manuscripts</span><span class="tq-tag">Publishing</span></div>
            </div>
          </a>
        </section>

        <section class="tq-col" id="sec-seminars">
          <div class="tq-sechead">
            <div>
              <span class="tq-num">[04]</span>
              <h2 class="tq-sectitle">Seminars &amp; Talks</h2>
              <p class="tq-secsub">Short talks on research life and tools.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <a class="tq-card" data-id="isgj" href="seminars/is-this-a-good-journal/">
            <div class="tq-img" style="--hue:#6fae9a; --d:.09s">
              <svg class="tq-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="tqc-lens"><rect x="28" y="30" width="44" height="42" rx="5"/><circle cx="70" cy="66" r="19"/></clipPath></defs>
                <rect class="d-area" x="28" y="30" width="44" height="42" rx="5" style="fill:var(--lite)"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="36" y1="44" x2="62" y2="44" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.5;--dl:.3s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="36" y1="55" x2="56" y2="55" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;opacity:.5;--dl:.42s"/>
                <line class="d-line" pathLength="100" x1="82" y1="80" x2="95" y2="93" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:round;--dl:.75s"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="70" cy="66" r="19" style="fill:var(--mid);--dl:.4s"/>
                <circle class="d-line" pathLength="100" cx="70" cy="66" r="19" style="fill:none;stroke:var(--deep);stroke-width:3;--dl:.55s"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="64" cy="60" r="6" style="fill:var(--soft);opacity:.6;--dl:.6s"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#tqc-lens)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.55"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#tq-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="tq-meta">
              <div class="tq-meta-top"><span class="tq-format">Seminar</span><span class="tq-date">Sep 2023</span></div>
              <p class="tq-cardname">Is This a Good Journal?</p>
              <div class="tq-tags"><span class="tq-tag">Publishing</span><span class="tq-tag">Peer review</span><span class="tq-tag">Talk</span></div>
            </div>
          </a>
        </section>
      </div>
    </main>

    <nav class="tq-toc" aria-label="Topics on this page">
      <p class="tq-toc-h">On this page</p>
      <a href="#sec-modelling" class="active"><span class="tn">01</span><span class="tt">Disease Modelling</span></a>
      <a href="#sec-r"><span class="tn">02</span><span class="tt">R Programming</span></a>
      <a href="#sec-skills"><span class="tn">03</span><span class="tt">Transferable Skills</span></a>
      <a href="#sec-seminars"><span class="tn">04</span><span class="tt">Seminars &amp; Talks</span></a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="tqm" id="tqm" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="tqm-scrim" data-close></div>
  <div class="tqm-dialog" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="tqm-title" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="tqm-accent" id="tqm-accent"></div>
    <button class="tqm-x" data-close aria-label="Close">&#10005;</button>
    <div class="tqm-body" id="tqm-body"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function(){
  var root = document.querySelector(".tq");
  if(!root) return;
  var reduce = window.matchMedia && matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches;

  // Reveal a block (and let its symbols draw) once it is on screen. This also
  // acts as a failsafe: if IntersectionObserver callbacks are deferred on a
  // background-tab or bfcache restore, the block would otherwise stay hidden.
  // Called on load, on pageshow, and from the scroll handler below.
  function revealInView(){
    var bs = root.querySelectorAll(".tq-block:not(.in)");
    for(var i=0;i<bs.length;i++){
      var r = bs[i].getBoundingClientRect();
      if(r.top < window.innerHeight * 0.92 && r.bottom > 0){ bs[i].classList.add("in"); }
    }
  }

  if(!reduce && "IntersectionObserver" in window){
    root.classList.add("anim");
    var reveal = new IntersectionObserver(function(es){
      es.forEach(function(e){ if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add("in"); reveal.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold:.08 });
    root.querySelectorAll(".tq-block").forEach(function(b){ reveal.observe(b); });
    revealInView();
    requestAnimationFrame(revealInView);
    window.addEventListener("pageshow", function(e){ if(e.persisted){ revealInView(); } });
  }

  // contents nav: one active group at a time (Disease Modelling, R Programming, or the duo)
  var links = root.querySelectorAll(".tq-toc a");
  var groups = [];
  var modSec = document.getElementById("sec-modelling");
  var rSec = document.getElementById("sec-r");
  var duoEl = root.querySelector(".tq-duo");
  if(modSec) groups.push({ el:modSec, ids:["sec-modelling"] });
  if(rSec) groups.push({ el:rSec, ids:["sec-r"] });
  if(duoEl) groups.push({ el:duoEl, ids:["sec-skills","sec-seminars"] });
  function setActive(ids){ links.forEach(function(l){ l.classList.toggle("active", ids.indexOf((l.hash||"").slice(1))>-1); }); }
  var navLock = 0;
  links.forEach(function(l){
    l.addEventListener("click", function(){
      var id=(l.hash||"").slice(1), g=null, i;
      for(i=0;i<groups.length;i++){ if(groups[i].ids.indexOf(id)>-1){ g=groups[i]; break; } }
      setActive(g?g.ids:[id]); navLock=Date.now();
    });
  });
  function spyScroll(){
    if(Date.now()-navLock < 1000 || !groups.length) return;
    var line=150, cur=groups[0], i;
    for(i=0;i<groups.length;i++){ if(groups[i].el.getBoundingClientRect().top <= line) cur=groups[i]; }
    setActive(cur.ids);
  }
  var ticking=false;
  window.addEventListener("scroll", function(){ if(!ticking){ ticking=true; requestAnimationFrame(function(){ revealInView(); spyScroll(); ticking=false; }); } }, {passive:true});
  window.addEventListener("resize", spyScroll, {passive:true});
  spyScroll();

  // ---- course modal ----
  var DATA = {
    "idm-intro":{topic:"Disease Modelling",name:"Introduction to Infectious Disease Modelling",hue:"#7d92d6",level:"Short course",format:"In person",when:"March 2023",where:"HCMC Centre for Disease Control",withWho:"Phung Khanh Lam and Thinh Ong",long:"A hands-on first course in compartmental modelling. Participants build SIR-type models from first principles, fit them to outbreak data, and learn to read the results so they can support real public health decisions.",tags:["SIR","Compartmental models","R"],link:"https://lampk.github.io/IDMIntro/",linkLabel:"Course homepage",photos:[]},
    "idm4b":{topic:"Disease Modelling",name:"Infectious Disease Modelling for Babies",hue:"#5fa6c6",level:"Lecture series",format:"In person",when:"May 2024",where:"HCMC Centre for Disease Control",withWho:"Thinh Ong",long:"A friendly lecture series on the basics of infectious disease modelling, taught in small, step-by-step sessions with plain language and approachable examples that make the maths feel within reach.",tags:["SIR","Beginners","Intuition"],link:"https://drthinhong.com/idm4b/",linkLabel:"Course homepage",photos:[]},
    "s4bvn":{topic:"Disease Modelling",name:"Statistics for Babies",hue:"#9485cf",level:"Lecture series",format:"In person",when:"December 2025",where:"HCMC Centre for Disease Control",withWho:"Thinh Ong",long:"A gentle lecture series on the statistics behind modelling: probability, distributions, likelihood, Bayesian inference and MCMC. Built on STATS 210 (Auckland) and Bolker's Ecological Models and Data in R.",tags:["Probability","Bayesian","MCMC"],link:"https://drthinhong.com/s4bvn/",linkLabel:"Read the book",photos:[]},
    "r4babies":{topic:"R Programming",name:"R for Babies",hue:"#c8a86a",level:"Short course",format:"In person",when:"August 2023",where:"HCMC Centre for Disease Control",withWho:"Thinh Ong",long:"A gentle, beginner-first path into R for data science. Taught for staff at the HCMC Centre for Disease Control, with live coding, real datasets, and plenty of small wins along the way.",tags:["R","Data science","Beginners"],link:"https://drthinhong.com/r4babies/",linkLabel:"Course homepage",photos:[{src:"others/r4babies/img/hcdc1.jpg",cap:"Live coding at HCMC CDC"},{src:"others/r4babies/img/hcdc2.jpg",cap:"Hands-on session with participants"}]},
    "r-training":{topic:"R Programming",name:"OUCRU R Training",hue:"#8aa86a",level:"Short course",format:"In person and online",when:"2025",where:"OUCRU",withWho:"Ronald Geskus, Thinh Ong and the OUCRU Modelling team",long:"A five-day OUCRU course covering R from the ground up: handling and exploring data in RStudio, the grammar of graphics for visualisation, advanced topics like functions, piping and iteration, and reproducible research with Quarto.",tags:["R","Data viz","Quarto"],link:"https://oucru-modelling.github.io/R-training-2025/",linkLabel:"Course homepage",photos:[]},
    "r-cafe":{topic:"R Programming",name:"R Café",hue:"#a8845e",level:"Short course",format:"In person and online",when:"2025",where:"OUCRU",withWho:"Thinh Ong and the OUCRU Modelling team",long:"A weekly, hands-on R cafe at OUCRU: three-hour face-to-face sessions with take-home exercises in between, covering R and Git, the tidyverse, data visualisation with ggplot2, and reproducible tables and reports with Quarto and gtsummary.",tags:["R","tidyverse","Quarto"],link:"https://oucru-modelling.github.io/R-cafe-materials/",linkLabel:"Course materials",photos:[]},
    "aw4b":{topic:"Transferable Skills",name:"Academic Writing",hue:"#c187a8",level:"Workshop",format:"In person",when:"2024",where:"HCMC Centre for Disease Control",withWho:"Thinh Ong",long:"A practical guide to the academic publication process. Understand what reviewers look for, how editors decide, and how to write a manuscript and cover letter that pass the test the first time.",tags:["Peer review","Manuscripts","Publishing"],link:"",linkLabel:"",photos:[]},
    "isgj":{topic:"Seminars & Talks",name:"Is This a Good Journal?",hue:"#6fae9a",level:"Seminar",format:"In person",when:"September 2023",where:"HCMC Centre for Disease Control",withWho:"Thinh Ong",long:"Learn how to tell trustworthy scientific journals from predatory ones, with simple checks you can run before you submit. A short, practical talk you can apply to your very next paper.",tags:["Publishing","Peer review","Talk"],link:"/slides/is-this-a-good-journal",linkLabel:"Presentation",photos:[{src:"seminars/is-this-a-good-journal/img/hcdc.jpg",cap:"Seminar with participants"}]}
  };
  function esc(s){ return String(s).replace(/[&<>"]/g,function(c){return {"&":"&amp;","<":"&lt;",">":"&gt;","\"":"&quot;"}[c];}); }
  var modal=document.getElementById("tqm"), mbody=document.getElementById("tqm-body"), accent=document.getElementById("tqm-accent"), lastFocus=null;
  if(modal && modal.parentNode!==document.body){ document.body.appendChild(modal); }
  function openModal(id){
    var it=DATA[id]; if(!it) return;
    accent.style.background="linear-gradient(90deg,"+it.hue+", color-mix(in srgb,"+it.hue+" 55%, #ffffff))";
    var gal = (it.photos&&it.photos.length) ? '<div class="tqm-gal">'+it.photos.map(function(p){return '<figure><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" src="'+p.src+'" alt="'+esc(p.cap)+'"><figcaption>'+esc(p.cap)+'</figcaption></figure>';}).join("")+'</div>' : "";
    var btn = it.link ? '<div class="tqm-btns"><a class="tqm-btn" href="'+it.link+'" target="_blank" rel="noopener">'+esc(it.linkLabel||"Visit")+' &#8599;</a></div>' : "";
    mbody.innerHTML =
      '<span class="tqm-eyebrow">'+esc(it.topic)+'</span>'+
      '<h2 class="tqm-title" id="tqm-title">'+esc(it.name)+'</h2>'+
      gal +
      '<div class="tqm-meta">'+
        '<div><div class="k">When</div><div class="v">'+esc(it.when)+'</div></div>'+
        '<div><div class="k">Where</div><div class="v">'+esc(it.where)+'</div></div>'+
        '<div><div class="k">With</div><div class="v">'+esc(it.withWho)+'</div></div>'+
        '<div><div class="k">Format</div><div class="v">'+esc(it.level)+' &middot; '+esc(it.format)+'</div></div>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<p class="tqm-long">'+esc(it.long)+'</p>'+
      '<div class="tqm-tags">'+it.tags.map(function(t){return '<span class="tqm-tag">'+esc(t)+'</span>';}).join("")+'</div>'+
      btn;
    modal.classList.add("open"); modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden","false");
    document.documentElement.style.overflow="hidden"; lastFocus=document.activeElement;
    modal.querySelector(".tqm-dialog").focus();
  }
  function closeModal(){ modal.classList.remove("open"); modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden","true"); document.documentElement.style.overflow=""; if(lastFocus) lastFocus.focus(); }
  root.querySelectorAll(".tq-card").forEach(function(c){
    c.addEventListener("click", function(e){ var id=c.getAttribute("data-id"); if(id&&DATA[id]){ e.preventDefault(); openModal(id); } });
  });
  modal.addEventListener("click", function(e){ if(e.target.hasAttribute("data-close")) closeModal(); });
  document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e){ if(e.key==="Escape" && modal.classList.contains("open")) closeModal(); });
})();
</script>
```
